steps.title: Substitute and distribute the negative sign
steps.content: Substitute $a = 4k + 5r$ and $b = 7k - 12r + 3$ into $a - b$, then distribute the negative through $b$: $$a - b = (4k + 5r) - (7k - 12r + 3) = 4k + 5r - 7k + 12r - 3$$

steps.title: Combine like terms to find the answer
steps.content:
Collect terms by variable:
  • k: $4k - 7k = -3k$
  • r: $5r + 12r = 17r$
  • Constant: $-3$
The expression simplifies to $-3k + 17r - 3$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
